column2: Visit the iconic Eiffel Tower, one of the most recognizable landmarks in the world.
Explore the world's largest and most famous museum, featuring an impressive collection of art and artifacts from ancient civilizations to the 19th century.
Wander through the charming streets and alleys of this historic neighborhood, known for its bohemian vibe, street artists, and stunning views of the city.
Visit the iconic monument that honors the soldiers who fought and died for France, with stunning views of the city from its top level.
Stroll along this famous avenue lined with cafes, shops, and theaters, and take in the sights and sounds of the city's most iconic street.
Visit this beautiful Gothic cathedral, one of the most famous landmarks in Paris, with stunning architecture and a rich history.
Explore the opulent palace and gardens of the former royal residence, featuring stunning art and architecture from the 17th century.
Take a romantic boat ride along the Seine River, offering stunning views of the city's landmarks and bridges.
Experience the magic of this world-famous cabaret, featuring spectacular shows and a touch of French glamour.
Visit the stunning opera house, known for its beautiful architecture and rich history, with guided tours available.
Enjoy panoramic views of the city from the top level of this 56-story skyscraper, with a restaurant and observation deck.
